info.title: semantic-release
info.description:
Version package per semantic version specification.

This is a fork of https://github.com/axlj45/dotnet-semantic-release.
I'm planning to merge my changes back to the original repo when I'm done. While I'm working on my changes, I'm publishing them to my own NuGet package to test them.

options.description: The directory that contains the git repository (the .git folder)

options.name: --release-branch
options.description: Branch that is permitted to perform a release.  Default is 'trunk'

commands.description: Create new version and prepare for release

options.description: Return non-zero exit code when no release is required.
